name: openxc7-database-virtex7
description: Canonical prjxray virtex7 device database for the openXC7 flow (VC707, xc7vx485tffg1761-2). The DB segbits/tilegrid live in this repo; the chipdb and wire oracle are derived release assets.

db._note: set per-release by recipes/cut-release.sh = git rev-parse HEAD of the DB

chipdb._note: the .bba binary format is tied to this nextpnr-xilinx commit; rebuild against it

oracle._note: RapidWright Device model; independent of the segbits here
